unsubscribe.forget_explainer: Permanently remove the record for the contact identity in this link (an irreversible hash plus how often we've seen or contacted it). This can't be undone. Other contact identities from past bookings, such as a phone number, are separate records.
unsubscribe.forgotten_message: Your contact record has been deleted.
